topic: Power Automate vs Zapier vs n8n 2026: Enterprise Automation Showdown
keyword: Power Automate vs Zapier vs n8n

key_points: Zapier wins on ease and app breadth (7,000+ integrations)
n8n wins on control and self-hosting for technical teams
Power Automate wins for Microsoft ecosystem organizations
Make offers best balance of power and cost for SMBs
Zapier best for non-technical teams needing 8,000+ app connections
n8n best for developers requiring custom logic, branching, parallel execution
n8n supports nested flows, error handling, and modular sub-flows
Zapier costs escalate sharply with task volume
n8n charges per execution vs Zapier per task (each action counts separately)
At 10,000 monthly executions: n8n $20 vs Zapier $399
At 100,000 executions: n8n cloud $50/month vs Zapier $799/month
Self-hosted n8n near-zero cost beyond infrastructure for high-volume enterprises
Power Automate deeply integrated with Teams, SharePoint, Outlook, Dynamics, Azure
Power Automate Desktop enables RPA for legacy systems without APIs
All three platforms now offer native AI connections to OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini
2025-2026 defining shift: AI agent workflow templates and LLM-native automation
n8n only viable option for HIPAA compliance and strict GDPR data residency
Zapier cloud-only (US servers) — hard blocker for regulated industries
Self-hosted n8n keeps all data within your own infrastructure
Moving 50,000 tasks/month from Zapier ($400/mo) to n8n reduces to $10/mo

stats.fact: Global business process automation revenue will reach USD 19.6 billion by 2026, up from ~USD 13 billion in 2022 (CAGR 13%+)
RPA Market estimated to grow from USD 8.12 billion in 2026 to USD 28.6 billion by 2031 (CAGR 28.66%)
Microsoft Power Automate holds ~4.28% market share in Business Process Management category
51.46% of Power Automate customers are from the United States; most often used by companies with >10,000 employees
n8n delivers 40-60% cost savings vs task-based alternatives like Zapier for enterprise workloads
At 10,000 monthly executions: n8n costs $20 vs Zapier $399 — annual savings of $4,548
At 100,000 monthly executions: Zapier $799/month vs n8n cloud $50/month; self-hosted n8n near-zero
Power Automate per-user plan at $15/user/month; per-flow at $100/flow/month (5-flow minimum); included in most M365 Business/Enterprise plans
Zapier connects 8,000+ apps; n8n has 400+ native integrations but unlimited custom via HTTP/webhooks
Over 15,869 companies use Power Automate as cloud-integration tool as of 2026

angles: Enterprise cost crisis: Why Zapier task-based pricing becomes financially unsustainable at scale (real numbers at 10K, 100K, 200K+ executions)
GDPR and data sovereignty showdown: n8n self-hosting as the only viable option for healthcare, finance, and government sectors
Microsoft ecosystem lock-in analysis: Power Automate hidden advantages for M365-first enterprises vs its limitations outside that ecosystem
AI agent integration race: How Power Automate Copilot, Zapier AI, and n8n AI nodes differ in 2026
Developer vs no-code divide: When complexity and custom logic make n8n the obvious choice over Zapier
Hybrid enterprise strategy: Running Zapier for business teams + n8n for engineering — the best of both worlds
RPA legacy integration: Power Automate Desktop unique ability to automate systems without APIs
Self-hosting TCO reality: True cost breakdown of running n8n vs paying Zapier cloud premiums
